title: Threat actors use custom AuraInspector to harvest data from Salesforce systems

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Threat actors use custom AuraInspector to harvest data from 
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/16
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*www.salesforce.com*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
